requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — Lighting Equipment (NA/CISPR 15) and Import Inspection
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——照明设备（NA/CISPR 15）及进口检验
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——照明設備（NA/CISPR 15）及進口檢驗

summary.en: For electromagnetic compatibility, Angola relies on IEC/CISPR-based standards that IANORQ adopts as national NA standards rather than an EU-style horizontal EMC Directive. The reference for lighting-equipment radio-disturbance limits is CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), the same international base from which the EU's EN 55015 is derived. Conducted emissions on the mains terminals and radiated emissions are the principal concerns for LED drivers and luminaires. In practice, EMC evidence for the Angolan market is provided through an IEC/CISPR-based test report supporting IANORQ conformity assessment and customs import inspection; there is no separate self-declared EU-style EMC marking. Because the international CISPR 15 base is shared with China and the EU, a luminaire already tested to CISPR 15 (or to GB 17743, which is CISPR 15-based) is generally well positioned, but the accepting authority and documentation route are Angolan.
summary.zh: 在电磁兼容方面，安哥拉依赖 IANORQ 采用为国家 NA 标准的 IEC/CISPR 基础标准，而非欧盟式横向 EMC 指令。照明设备无线电干扰限值的参考为 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电干扰特性的限值和测量方法）——欧盟 EN 55015 即由该国际基础衍生。电源端传导发射及辐射发射是 LED 驱动器与灯具的主要关注点。实务上，安哥拉市场的 EMC 证据通过基于 IEC/CISPR 的检测报告提供，以支撑 IANORQ 合格评定及海关进口检验；不存在单独的欧盟式自我声明 EMC 标志。由于该国际 CISPR 15 基础与中国及欧盟共享，已按 CISPR 15（或按基于 CISPR 15 的 GB 17743）检测的灯具一般处于有利位置，但受理机关与文件路径为安哥拉的。
summary.zht: 在電磁兼容方面，安哥拉依賴 IANORQ 採用為國家 NA 標準的 IEC/CISPR 基礎標準，而非歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令。照明設備無線電干擾限值的參考為 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電干擾特性的限值和測量方法）——歐盟 EN 55015 即由該國際基礎衍生。電源端傳導發射及輻射發射是 LED 驅動器與燈具的主要關注點。實務上，安哥拉市場的 EMC 證據通過基於 IEC/CISPR 的檢測報告提供，以支撐 IANORQ 合格評定及海關進口檢驗；不存在單獨的歐盟式自我聲明 EMC 標誌。由於該國際 CISPR 15 基礎與中國及歐盟共享，已按 CISPR 15（或按基於 CISPR 15 的 GB 17743）檢測的燈具一般處於有利位置，但受理機關與文件路徑為安哥拉的。

standards_or_laws: NA/CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (CISPR standard adopted as an Angolan NA standard by IANORQ)
IANORQ conformity assessment / customs import inspection for regulated products

summary.en: China's equivalent emissions standard for lighting equipment is GB 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which is technically based on CISPR 15. Lighting EMC requirements form part of the CCC technical basis for in-scope luminaires, with testing by CNCA-authorized laboratories. Because GB 17743 and the Angolan NA/CISPR 15 reference share the same CISPR 15 international base, the emission limits and measurement methods are closely aligned; the conformity route and accepting authority differ.
summary.zh: 中国照明设备对应的发射标准为 GB 17743（电气照明和类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上以 CISPR 15 为基础。照明 EMC 要求构成范围内灯具 CCC 技术基础的一部分，由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。由于 GB 17743 与安哥拉 NA/CISPR 15 参考共享同一 CISPR 15 国际基础，发射限值与测量方法高度一致；合格评定路径与受理机关不同。
summary.zht: 中國照明設備對應的發射標準為 GB 17743（電氣照明和類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上以 CISPR 15 為基礎。照明 EMC 要求構成範圍內燈具 CCC 技術基礎的一部分，由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。由於 GB 17743 與安哥拉 NA/CISPR 15 參考共享同一 CISPR 15 國際基礎，發射限值與測量方法高度一致；合格評定路徑與受理機關不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR; CISPR 15-based)
CNCA CCC technical basis — lighting EMC for in-scope luminaires

gap.en: The technical content is closely aligned because both GB 17743 and the Angolan NA reference derive from CISPR 15, so a product that already meets the Chinese emission limits generally meets the substantive Angolan requirement. The gaps are procedural: (1) Angola accepts EMC evidence through IANORQ conformity assessment and customs import inspection on the basis of an IEC/CISPR-based test report, not via a Chinese CCC certificate; (2) documentation supporting the import is generally expected in Portuguese; (3) the in-country importer presents the conformity package. Where the luminaire is purely wired (no radio functionality), CISPR 15 emissions evidence is typically the main EMC item; wireless/smart luminaires additionally trigger INACOM radio approval (see ledao-emc-02). Confirm with IANORQ / the importer whether immunity (IEC 61547-based) evidence is also requested.
gap.zh: 由于 GB 17743 与安哥拉 NA 参考均源自 CISPR 15，技术内容高度一致，因此已满足中国发射限值的产品一般也满足安哥拉的实质性要求。差距在程序：（1）安哥拉通过 IANORQ 合格评定及海关进口检验，以基于 IEC/CISPR 的检测报告为依据接受 EMC 证据，而非凭中国 CCC 证书；（2）支撑进口的文件一般预期为葡萄牙语；（3）由在地进口商提交合规材料。对于纯有线灯具（无无线功能），CISPR 15 发射证据通常为主要 EMC 项目；无线/智能灯具还触发 INACOM 无线电核准（见 ledao-emc-02）。请与 IANORQ/进口商确认是否还要求抗扰度（基于 IEC 61547）证据。
gap.zht: 由於 GB 17743 與安哥拉 NA 參考均源自 CISPR 15，技術內容高度一致，因此已滿足中國發射限值的產品一般也滿足安哥拉的實質性要求。差距在程序：（1）安哥拉通過 IANORQ 合格評定及海關進口檢驗，以基於 IEC/CISPR 的檢測報告為依據接受 EMC 證據，而非憑中國 CCC 證書；（2）支撐進口的文件一般預期為葡萄牙語；（3）由在地進口商提交合規材料。對於純有線燈具（無無線功能），CISPR 15 發射證據通常為主要 EMC 項目；無線/智能燈具還觸發 INACOM 無線電核准（見 ledao-emc-02）。請與 IANORQ/進口商確認是否還要求抗擾度（基於 IEC 61547）證據。

mandatory_status.target: Expected mandatory (procedural) — CISPR 15-based emissions evidence supports IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection; there is no EU-style self-declared EMC mark. Confirm exact NA reference and whether immunity evidence is required with IANORQ / the importer
mandatory_status.cn: EMC forms part of the CCC technical basis for in-scope luminaires; GB 17743 (CISPR 15-based) is the applicable emissions standard

source.publisher: ISO member directory — IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola handles lighting EMC through IEC/CISPR-based NA standards (CISPR 15) and import inspection rather than an EU-style EMC Directive. A luminaire already tested to CISPR 15 (or to CISPR 15-based GB 17743) generally meets the substantive emission limits, but the Angolan route requires an IEC/CISPR-based test report, Portuguese import documentation, and an in-country importer presenting the package to IANORQ / customs. A Chinese CCC certificate is not by itself accepted. Confirm the exact NA reference and any immunity (IEC 61547-based) requirement before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安哥拉通过基于 IEC/CISPR 的 NA 标准（CISPR 15）及进口检验处理照明 EMC，而非欧盟式 EMC 指令。已按 CISPR 15（或按基于 CISPR 15 的 GB 17743）检测的灯具一般满足实质性发射限值，但安哥拉路径要求基于 IEC/CISPR 的检测报告、葡萄牙语进口文件，以及由在地进口商向 IANORQ/海关提交材料。中国 CCC 证书本身不被接受。出货前请确认确切 NA 参考及任何抗扰度（基于 IEC 61547）要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安哥拉通過基於 IEC/CISPR 的 NA 標準（CISPR 15）及進口檢驗處理照明 EMC，而非歐盟式 EMC 指令。已按 CISPR 15（或按基於 CISPR 15 的 GB 17743）檢測的燈具一般滿足實質性發射限值，但安哥拉路徑要求基於 IEC/CISPR 的檢測報告、葡萄牙語進口文件，以及由在地進口商向 IANORQ/海關提交材料。中國 CCC 證書本身不被接受。出貨前請確認確切 NA 參考及任何抗擾度（基於 IEC 61547）要求。

requirement_topic.en: Wireless / Smart Luminaire Radio Approval — INACOM (vs SRRC)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线 / 智能灯具无线电核准——INACOM（对比 SRRC）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線 / 智能燈具無線電核准——INACOM（對比 SRRC）

summary.en: LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee dimming, smart-lighting control) require radio type approval from INACOM (Instituto Angolano das Comunicacoes), Angola's telecommunications and radio regulator, before being placed on the Angolan market. INACOM administers spectrum and equipment approval for radio-emitting devices; approval is in addition to, not a substitute for, the electrical-safety (NA/IEC 60598 / NA/IEC 62560) and CISPR 15 emissions evidence handled via IANORQ. The radio module's operating frequency bands and power must be permitted under Angolan spectrum rules. The local in-country importer/representative typically files for INACOM approval, supported by the radio test report for the module. Purely wired luminaires with no radio function do not require INACOM approval.
summary.zh: 集成无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 调光、智能照明控制）的 LED 灯具在投放安哥拉市场前，须取得安哥拉电信与无线电监管机构 INACOM（安哥拉通信研究所）的无线电型号核准。INACOM 负责无线电发射设备的频谱与设备核准；该核准是对经 IANORQ 处理的电气安全（NA/IEC 60598 / NA/IEC 62560）及 CISPR 15 发射证据的补充，而非替代。无线模块的工作频段及功率须符合安哥拉频谱规则。通常由在地进口商/代表凭模块无线电检测报告向 INACOM 申请核准。无无线电功能的纯有线灯具无需 INACOM 核准。
summary.zht: 集成無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 調光、智能照明控制）的 LED 燈具在投放安哥拉市場前，須取得安哥拉電信與無線電監管機構 INACOM（安哥拉通信研究所）的無線電型號核准。INACOM 負責無線電發射設備的頻譜與設備核准；該核准是對經 IANORQ 處理的電氣安全（NA/IEC 60598 / NA/IEC 62560）及 CISPR 15 發射證據的補充，而非替代。無線模組的工作頻段及功率須符合安哥拉頻譜規則。通常由在地進口商/代表憑模組無線電檢測報告向 INACOM 申請核准。無無線電功能的純有線燈具無需 INACOM 核准。

standards_or_laws: INACOM (Instituto Angolano das Comunicacoes) — radio equipment type approval and spectrum authorisation for wireless-enabled devices in Angola
Angolan national spectrum/frequency allocation rules administered by INACOM

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires (e.g. smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval for the radio module, in addition to any CCC obligations for the luminaire's safety. SRRC approval covers permitted frequency bands and transmit power under Chinese radio rules. SRRC type approval is specific to China and is not recognised by INACOM; a separate Angolan radio approval is required.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线功能灯具（如具备 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED）除灯具安全方面的任何 CCC 义务外，其无线模块还须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。SRRC 核准涵盖中国无线电规则下允许的频段与发射功率。SRRC 型号核准为中国特有，不被 INACOM 认可；须另行取得安哥拉无线电核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線功能燈具（如具備 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED）除燈具安全方面的任何 CCC 義務外，其無線模組還須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。SRRC 核准涵蓋中國無線電規則下允許的頻段與發射功率。SRRC 型號核准為中國特有，不被 INACOM 認可；須另行取得安哥拉無線電核准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled equipment placed on the Chinese market (State Radio Regulation Commission)

gap.en: Both China (SRRC) and Angola (INACOM) require separate national radio type approval for wireless luminaires, with no mutual recognition — a Chinese SRRC approval does not carry into Angola, and a fresh INACOM approval must be obtained. Key points for the Angolan market: (1) confirm the radio module's frequency bands and transmit power are permitted under Angolan spectrum rules before designing in a module; (2) INACOM approval is in addition to IANORQ-route electrical safety and CISPR 15 emissions evidence; (3) the in-country importer/representative typically files the INACOM application using the module's radio test report; (4) approval timelines and documentation (in Portuguese) should be factored into the launch plan. For a purely wired SKU, no INACOM step is needed — separating wired and wireless SKUs can simplify market entry.
gap.zh: 中国（SRRC）与安哥拉（INACOM）均要求无线灯具取得各自的国家无线电型号核准，且不存在互认——中国 SRRC 核准不能带入安哥拉，须重新取得 INACOM 核准。面向安哥拉市场的要点：（1）在设计采用模块前，确认无线模块的频段与发射功率符合安哥拉频谱规则；（2）INACOM 核准是对 IANORQ 路径电气安全及 CISPR 15 发射证据的补充；（3）通常由在地进口商/代表凭模块无线电检测报告提交 INACOM 申请；（4）核准时程及（葡萄牙语）文件应纳入上市计划。对于纯有线 SKU，无需 INACOM 步骤——区分有线与无线 SKU 可简化市场准入。
gap.zht: 中國（SRRC）與安哥拉（INACOM）均要求無線燈具取得各自的國家無線電型號核准，且不存在互認——中國 SRRC 核准不能帶入安哥拉，須重新取得 INACOM 核准。面向安哥拉市場的要點：（1）在設計採用模組前，確認無線模組的頻段與發射功率符合安哥拉頻譜規則；（2）INACOM 核准是對 IANORQ 路徑電氣安全及 CISPR 15 發射證據的補充；（3）通常由在地進口商/代表憑模組無線電檢測報告提交 INACOM 申請；（4）核准時程及（葡萄牙語）文件應納入上市計劃。對於純有線 SKU，無需 INACOM 步驟——區分有線與無線 SKU 可簡化市場准入。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless-enabled luminaires — INACOM radio type approval required before market placement in Angola; not required for purely wired luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless-enabled luminaires — SRRC type approval required for the radio module on the Chinese market

source.publisher: INACOM — Instituto Angolano das Comunicacoes (Angolan telecommunications regulator)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless/smart LED luminaires for Angola require INACOM radio type approval in addition to IANORQ-route electrical safety and CISPR 15 emissions evidence. A Chinese SRRC approval is not recognised by INACOM, so a separate Angolan approval is needed; confirm the module's bands and power are permitted under Angolan spectrum rules. Purely wired luminaires do not need INACOM approval, so separating wired and wireless SKUs can simplify entry. The in-country importer/representative typically files the INACOM application with the module radio test report.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向安哥拉的无线/智能 LED 灯具除 IANORQ 路径电气安全及 CISPR 15 发射证据外，还须取得 INACOM 无线电型号核准。中国 SRRC 核准不被 INACOM 认可，须另行取得安哥拉核准；请确认模块频段与功率符合安哥拉频谱规则。纯有线灯具无需 INACOM 核准，故区分有线与无线 SKU 可简化准入。通常由在地进口商/代表凭模块无线电检测报告提交 INACOM 申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向安哥拉的無線/智能 LED 燈具除 IANORQ 路徑電氣安全及 CISPR 15 發射證據外，還須取得 INACOM 無線電型號核准。中國 SRRC 核准不被 INACOM 認可，須另行取得安哥拉核准；請確認模組頻段與功率符合安哥拉頻譜規則。純有線燈具無需 INACOM 核准，故區分有線與無線 SKU 可簡化准入。通常由在地進口商/代表憑模組無線電檢測報告提交 INACOM 申請。
